6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-639", "name": "Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key"}], "description": "## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Affected versions: `< 2026.4.20`
- Patched version: `2026.4.20`

## Impact

Templated hook mapping `sessionKey` values were treated differently from request-supplied session keys. A hook mapping could render an externally influenced session key even when `hooks.allowRequestSessionKey` was disabled, bypassing the intended routing opt-in for hook callers.

This affects webhook routing isolation. It does not grant host execution by itself. Severity is medium.

## Fix

Template-rendered mapping session keys are now treated as externally supplied routing input and require `hooks.allowRequestSessionKey=true` plus the existing prefix policy checks.

Fix commit:

- `5275d008ed33203dba3f98e969ad683a65c416c3`

## Release

Fixed in OpenClaw `2026.4.20`.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00279, "percentile": 0.19505}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-2xcp-x87w-q377", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-25T23:45:11Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2xcp-x87w-q377", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-2xcp-x87w-q377"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45002"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-25T23:45:11Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-2xcp-x87w-q377", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/5275d008ed33203dba3f98e969ad683a65c416c3", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45002", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-hook-session-key-bypass-via-template-mapping", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2xcp-x87w-q377"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-2xcp-x87w-q377", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Hook mapping templates could bypass hook session-key opt-in", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-19T15:56:34Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-2xcp-x87w-q377", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.20", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.20"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: Hook mapping templates could bypass hook session-key opt-in
